title: campylotropis pinetorum subsp. albopubescens
intro: Campylotropis pinetorum subsp. albopubescens, also known as the Pine Mountain Campylotropis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campylotropis pinetorum subsp. albopubescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
